nodes.label: AI as coding assistant for unfamiliar languages
nodes.grounding_span: The AI is only useful for me when I don't know exactly or don't remember how to do something

nodes.label: AI for language translation
nodes.grounding_span: I asked to translate some code from C to Python and it got it right on the first attempt

nodes.label: AI reliability for practical tasks
nodes.grounding_span: It is necessary to check carefully that it is correct

nodes.label: AI requiring context explanation
nodes.grounding_span: It is difficult to delegate tasks that need a lot of context

nodes.label: AI integration into existing software
nodes.label_negative: Manual code pasting and context setting
nodes.grounding_span: It is more convenient. I do not need to paste long strings of code

nodes.label: Productivity and efficiency
nodes.grounding_span: it saved me a lot of time

nodes.label: Epistemic understanding and skill development
nodes.grounding_span: I learn some new trick that I may apply directly myself

nodes.label: Reliability and correctness
nodes.grounding_span: It is necessary to check carefully that it is correct

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for code translation
nodes.grounding_span: I felt quite satisfied once that I asked to translate some code from C to Python and it got it right on the first attempt

nodes.label: Frustration with AI's inability to maintain context
nodes.grounding_span: It is difficult to delegate tasks that need a lot of context. It requires too long prompts and tend to provide bad results

nodes.label: Preference for self-reliance when capable
nodes.grounding_span: If I know well how to write some piece of code, it is more reliable to do it myself

nodes.label: Principled minimal use of AI
nodes.grounding_span: It is more convenient. I do not need to paste long strings of code

nodes.label: Cost-benefit analysis of explanation time vs. doing it yourself
nodes.grounding_span: I frequently find that it is faster to write the code myself than to try to explain to the AI what I need

nodes.label: Selective delegation based on task nature
nodes.grounding_span: The level of understanding the code may depend on how critical is that part of the code
